news.headline: US moves 2,000 Marines from Japan to Middle East as Iran war intensifies
news.summary:
The US military has started moving at least one amphibious assault ship and more than 2,000 Marines from Japan to the Middle East as the US-Israeli war against Iran continues, according to US media reports.

news.headline: Purrs of approval for Yau Ma Tei cat mural as community art project draws crowds
news.summary:
On the weathered facade of the Kiu Kong Mansion on Nathan Road, two freshly painted cats now curl into the bustle of Hong Kong’s Yau Ma Tei.
The mural features a ragdoll and a British shorthair cat, two breeds loved by Hongkongers, bringing a burst of colour and whimsy to the ageing building.

news.headline: Smoke seen rising from US embassy in Baghdad
news.summary: Videos posted by social media users showed smoke rising from the US embassy in Baghdad after a reported attack.

news.headline: Yemeni ports face shipping fee hike amid Iran conflict
news.summary: Yemen’s government rejects new shipping surcharges, as fears grow of humanitarian crisis.
